hero.headline:
Watch Together.
Anywhere, Anytime.
hero.subtitle: Discover, track, and share your favorite movies and series with friends. Your next binge is just a click away.
hero.androidBadgeSubtitle: Join the waitlist and be the first to know.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: From discovery to tracking, WatchNext has you covered across all your favorite platforms.

discovery.title: Smart Discovery
discovery.description: Get personalized recommendations powered by your watch history and preferences.

tracking.title: Unified Tracking
tracking.description: Keep tabs on everything you watch across Netflix, Prime, Hulu, and more.

social.title: Social Watchlist
social.description: Create and share watchlists with friends. Never lose track of what to watch next.

calendar.title: Release Calendar
calendar.description: Stay up to date with upcoming releases, new seasons, and premiere dates.

ratings.title: Smart Ratings
ratings.description: See combined scores from IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic in one place.

offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.description: Browse your library and plan your watchlist even without an internet connection.

platforms.title: Available Everywhere
platforms.subtitle: WatchNext comes to all your devices. Start on one, continue on another.

web.name: Web
web.description: Access WatchNext from any browser. No download required.

windows.name: Windows
windows.description: Native Windows app with full offline support and system tray integration.

android.name: Android
android.description: Take your watchlist on the go with the Android mobile app.

premium.title: Go Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock exclusive features and enhance your viewing experience.

roadmap.title: What's Coming Next
roadmap.subtitle: Here's what we're building. Follow along as we bring WatchNext to every platform.

q1_2026.title: Core Platform Launch
q1_2026.description: Initial release with web app, basic tracking, and cross-platform watchlist sync.

q2_2026.title: Social Features
q2_2026.description: Friend lists, shared watchlists, activity feeds, and comment threads.

q3_2026.title: Mobile Apps
q3_2026.description: Native Android app with offline mode, widgets, and push notifications.

q4_2026.title: Recommendation Engine
q4_2026.description: AI-powered suggestions based on watch history, genre preferences, and social trends.

q1_2027.title: Windows Desktop App
q1_2027.description: Native Windows client with system tray, PIP mode, and keyboard shortcuts.

q2_2027.title: API & Integrations
q2_2027.description: Public API for third-party developers and integrations with Plex, Jellyfin, and Kodi.

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.description: Get the latest features, platform updates, and curated recommendations delivered to your inbox.

footer.brandDescription: Discover, track, and share your favorite movies and series. Your next binge starts here.
